items.title: Community Shield date confirmed: City in Cardiff
items.summary: The season curtain-raiser is set for 16 August at the Principality Stadium — champions against cup winners, and the first competitive look at both rebuilt squads.

items.title: Twenty-two years since the Invincibles sealed it
items.summary: 9 June marks the anniversary of the unbeaten season's coronation — 26 wins, 12 draws, zero defeats. Last season's title is the first since.

items.title: Pre-season touring schedule announced
items.summary: Three friendlies confirmed before the Shield, with the squad reporting back to London Colney in the first week of July.

items.title: Transfer window opens with the squad settled
items.summary: The champions' summer looks like retention over revolution: extension talks for key forwards are the priority, with one midfield addition expected.
